comments: Approved. The implementation in commit 650223d correctly exposes the 5 new MCP tools (cowork_start_task, cowork_read_file, cowork_write_file, cowork_list_directory, cowork_finish_task) via ListToolsRequestSchema. The execution logic successfully proxies read, write, and list operations to the hidden Worktree Sandbox instantiated by cowork_start_task, effectively spoofing the context to isolate file mutations. Security boundary logic was properly tightened using exact path segment match constraints to prevent sibling directory traversal attacks. No documentation edits were performed, keeping the boundary strictly to M3 requirements.
